mapper.sql: id, name, cover, banner_images, developer, address, description, opening_time, delivery_time, status, deleted, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO building ( name, cover, banner_images, developer, address, description, opening_time, delivery_time, status, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{cover}, #{bannerImages}, #{developer}, #{address}, #{description}, #{openingTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE building SET name = #{name}, cover = #{cover}, banner_images = #{bannerImages}, developer = #{developer}, address = #{address}, description = #{description}, opening_time = #{openingTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE building SET status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE building SET deleted = 1, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM building WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM building WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
